Minor'S Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for order approving compromise of a minor's claim.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott,
CSR: Deborah Neville
Counsel: Noah Cutler present for Petitioners: Marlon Brandon Pelejo, Sr. & Brenda Pelejo,
Guardian ad litem for Claimant: Marlon Brandon Pelejo Jr., minor.
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court approves the settlement. The two submitted orders were signed in open court. See scanned document.
